sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94238" key="sini/asma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σινί-ασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94238.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">detrimentum, recrementum, retrimentum</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ς. ἢ ῥυπαρία τοῦ σίτου</foreign>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
